summary: Improved the DinoBrain Observatory dinosaur graph candidate after user feedback that the previous deployed visual felt disappointing. Kept changes visual-only: increased graph canvas height, added aspect-preserving dino frame mapping, redistributed root/category nodes into head/neck/tail/leg roles, strengthened pose lock, reduced edge physics, and added live-data scaffold routes. Updated design QA with v7 screenshots and marked the result as a review candidate rather than release-ready.
decisions: Do not deploy this visual automatically because the side-by-side comparison still differs from the provided reference.
Keep the implementation live-data-driven by using actual nodes, including root category nodes, rather than adding fake decorative node assets.
Record the design result as candidate / needs review in design-qa.md.
next_steps: User should review the v7 candidate screenshot or local Observatory at http://127.0.0.1:3951/.
If the target is closer reference fidelity, implement a graph-only presentation mode with deterministic slotting for every live node before release.
If the user accepts this as better than the current deployed version, commit, push, bump release, and upload the installer ZIP.
